warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
5 Glute Bridge @ 50% DL
15 RDL Empty Bar
15 Bent Over Row Empty Bar
10 Banded Pallof Press
10 Scap Pull Ups

metcon.name: "Topsy"
metcon.description:
Complete as many rounds and reps as possible in 25 minutes of:
3 ring muscle-ups
8 thrusters (75lb / 115lb)
17-calorie row
Intermediate:
55lb / 75lb, 3 Jumping Ring Muscle Ups
Scaled
: 35lb / 45lb, 3 Low Ring Muscle Up Transitions, 12 Calorie Row
McCoy “Topsy” Turner, a loved member of the CrossFit community and former Seminar Staff trainer, died by suicide on March 8, 2025, after suffering from complex post-traumatic stress.
Turner served for 17 years in the Royal Navy, specializing as an exercise rehabilitation instructor. He was part of Operation Herrick when he served in Afghanistan before relocating to Bali and continuing his work in CrossFit education. Turner worked more than 250 Level 1 and Level 2 Seminars.
Turner was known for his warmth and kindness, and touched countless lives who attended CrossFit courses. He is survived by his sons Brodie and Tommy.

hypertrophy.reasoning: Deadlift and thrusters hammer lower body and front delts; accessory work targets opposing/non-competing muscles.

Deadlift | 4x6 | E2MOM 12 mins
BUILD 2 sets
00:00 6 @ 50%
02:00 6 @ 60%
Hold 4x6
04:00 6 @ 65%

08:00 6 @ 65%
10:00 6 @ 65%

Turner served for 17 years in the Royal Navy, specializing as an exercise rehabilitation instructor. He was part of Operation Herrick when he served in Afghanistan before relocating to Bali and continuing his work in CrossFit education. Turner worked more than 250 Level 1 and Level 2 Seminars.
Turner was known for his warmth and kindness, and touched countless lives who attended CrossFit courses. He is survived by his sons Brodie and Tommy.
siri_text: Friday's workout. Strength: Deadlift, 4 by 6 at 65 percent. Metcon: "Topsy". Workout: 3 ring muscle-ups, 8 thrusters (75lb / 115lb), 17-calorie row, Intermediate:, 55lb / 75lb, 3 Jumping Ring Muscle Ups. For hypertrophy, focus on rear deltoids, biceps, abs.
